case.title: MARINE INS CO OF ALEXANDRIA v. YOUNG

opinion.h: MARINE INS CO OF ALEXANDRIA v. YOUNG, 5 U.S. 332 (1803)
Marine Insurance Company of Alexandria v. JAMES YOUNG.
opinion.p: In this case it was held, that an action of assumpsit could not be brought in a policy of insurance under seal; and the defect is not cured by verdict.
